title: What is Connektly? Platform overview and key features
author: Shivam Madaan
excerpt: This guide explains what Connektly is, how it works, and the key features that help businesses manage customer conversations and grow their business.
content:
Overview

Connektly is designed to help businesses communicate with customers on the messaging channels they already use.

Instead of relying on separate tools for marketing, sales, and support, Connektly brings these capabilities together in one platform. It combines:

  • Messaging

  • Automation

  • Artificial Intelligence (AI)

  • Customer Relationship Management (CRM)

  • Analytics

This allows teams to manage the entire customer journey from one place.

By centralizing conversations and automating repetitive tasks, Connektly helps teams respond faster, improve customer engagement, and manage communication more efficiently.

How Connektly Works

Connektly connects your messaging channels to a shared platform where your team can manage conversations, automate workflows, and track performance.

A typical workflow includes:

  1. A customer contacts your business through a supported messaging channel

  2. The message appears in the Connektly Team Inbox

  3. AI agents or chatbots respond automatically, or the chat is assigned to a team member

  4. Customer information is stored in the built-in CRM

  5. Analytics track campaigns, conversations, and sales activity

This unified flow enables efficient communication and engagement from a single platform.

Supported Communication Channels

Connektly allows you to manage conversations across multiple channels, including:

  • WhatsApp (text and calling)

  • Instagram

  • Facebook

  • RCS (Rich Communication Services)

  • SMS (Short Message Service)

  • TikTok

All channels are managed through a shared inbox, allowing teams to respond without switching between tools.

Key Features

1. Lead Generation Tools

Connektly helps businesses capture and manage leads from multiple sources.

You can:

  • Run Click-to-WhatsApp ads on Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, and Google

  • Add a WhatsApp widget to your website

  • Upload contact lists

  • Capture leads from Instagram and Facebook comments

All leads are centralized, making it easier to track and manage opportunities.

2. Broadcast Campaigns and Segmentation

Connektly enables targeted messaging through segmentation and broadcast campaigns.

You can:

  • Create audience segments

  • Use AI-powered message templates

  • Schedule campaigns

  • Track campaign performance

This ensures relevant communication is delivered to the right audience at the right time.

3. AI Agents and Automation

Connektly includes built-in AI tools to automate communication and improve response times.

Features include:

  • Astra AI agents for lead qualification and support

  • Chatbots for instant replies

  • AI Copilot for agent assistance

  • Template Assist for message drafting

  • Real-time translation

  • Customer Experience Score tracking

These tools reduce manual effort and improve scalability.

4. Shared Team Inbox and Collaboration

The shared inbox allows teams to collaborate effectively.

Teams can:

  • Assign chats to members

  • Add internal notes

  • View conversation history

  • Monitor performance

This improves accountability and response times.

5. Sales Pipeline and CRM Tools

Connektly includes a built-in CRM for managing and converting leads.

You can:

  • Track deals with a visual sales pipeline

  • Manage follow-ups

  • Retarget warm leads

  • Collect payments within WhatsApp

This allows sales teams to operate without switching tools.

6. Customer Support and Retention Tools

Connektly helps maintain long-term customer relationships.

You can:

  • Automate support with AI

  • Respond faster to inquiries

  • Send re-engagement campaigns

  • Maintain ongoing communication

This improves customer satisfaction and retention.

7. Analytics and Reporting

Connektly provides insights to measure and optimize performance.

You can track:

  • Click-to-WhatsApp ad performance

  • Broadcast campaign results

  • Inbox activity and response metrics

  • Sales pipeline performance

  • AI agent performance

These insights help improve strategy and engagement.

How Connektly Supports the Customer Journey

Connektly supports all stages of the customer lifecycle:

  • Generate leads through ads, widgets, and social media

  • Engage prospects through automated and live messaging

  • Convert conversations into sales using CRM tools

  • Provide customer support via shared inbox and AI

  • Retain customers through targeted campaigns

Managing all stages within one platform ensures consistent communication and better outcomes.

Who Should Use Connektly

Connektly is ideal for businesses that:

  • Use messaging channels like WhatsApp for communication

  • Want to automate lead qualification or support

  • Need better visibility into conversations and performance

  • Want to manage marketing, sales, and support in one place

It is suitable for both growing businesses and larger teams looking to scale communication efficiently.

Getting Started with Connektly

Connektly brings messaging, automation, sales tools, and analytics into a unified platform.

By centralizing conversations and automating routine tasks, businesses can:

  • Respond faster

  • Improve engagement

  • Manage communication more effectively

This makes it a powerful solution for scaling customer interactions and business growth.

title: Connektly Vs WhatsApp Business App: What's the difference?
author: Shivam
excerpt: Understand how WhatsApp Business API works, how it differ from the WhatsApp Business App, and how it can help small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs), you've come to the right place
content:
📘 WhatsApp Business API & CONNEKTLY Guide

🔹 What Is WhatsApp Business API?

The WhatsApp Business API was launched to help medium to large companies communicate with customers at scale. It enables businesses to automate communication using:

  • Automated replies

  • WhatsApp chatbots

  • Interactive messages

In short, the API allows businesses to create personalized and scalable communication flows tailored to their customers.

📱 WhatsApp Business App

The WhatsApp Business App (and its web version) is a free tool designed for small businesses. It helps them:

  • Connect with customers

  • Showcase products and services

  • Provide customer support

However, it has limited capabilities and is not designed for scaling operations.

⚠️ Limitations of the WhatsApp Business App

  • Cannot send bulk messages to customers or leads

  • Cannot trigger automated messages via APIs

  • Does not support multiple logins or agent performance dashboards

👉 All of these limitations can be overcome by using the WhatsApp Business API.

🚀 What is CONNEKTLY?

CONNEKTLY is a powerful platform that acts as a central hub for WhatsApp business communication.

With CONNEKTLY, you can:

  • Send and receive messages

  • Automate replies

  • Build chatbots

  • Integrate WhatsApp with other business tools

By using WhatsApp through CONNEKTLY, businesses can significantly improve:

  • Customer support

  • Marketing

  • Sales processes

🧠 Pre-Onboarding Considerations

Before using the WhatsApp Business API, keep these points in mind:

  • If onboarded via a provider like CONNEKTLY, previous chats will not be visible

  • If using Embedded Signup, the number cannot be used on WhatsApp or WhatsApp Business apps

📩 Post-Onboarding Guidelines

  • Businesses can send messages only after a customer initiates a conversation

  • These are called session messages

  • Session messages can be sent within 24 hours of the customer's message

📌 Key Points to Remember

  • After 24 hours, the session expires

  • Only pre-approved template messages can be sent after that

  • Templates must follow WhatsApp Commerce Policies

  • Templates can be managed via the CONNEKTLY dashboard

❌ Not Supported

  • WhatsApp Groups

  • Video calls

  • Message forwarding

  • Deleting sent messages

✅ Supported

  • Voice notes

  • WhatsApp calling

⚠️ Also note:

  • WhatsApp apps cannot be used with the same number once API is active

❓ Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

🔹 General Questions

1. What is the WhatsApp Business API?

A solution for medium to large businesses to communicate at scale with automation, chatbots, and advanced workflows.

2. How is it different from the WhatsApp Business App?

  • The app is for small businesses with basic features

  • The API supports automation, integrations, multi-agent access, and scalability

3. What are the limitations of the app?

  • No bulk messaging

  • No API automation

  • No multi-agent dashboards

🔹 CONNEKTLY-Specific Questions

4. What is CONNEKTLY?

A platform that centralizes WhatsApp communication with automation, chatbots, and integrations.

5. Can I view previous chats after onboarding?

No, previous chats are not accessible after onboarding via API providers.

6. Can I use the same number on WhatsApp apps?

No, once onboarded (via Embedded Signup), the number cannot be used on WhatsApp mobile apps.

🔹 Messaging Rules & Guidelines

7. When can businesses send messages?

Only within 24 hours of a customer initiating a chat (session messages).

8. What happens after 24 hours?

Only pre-approved template messages can be sent.

9. What features are not supported?

  • Groups

  • Video calls

  • Message forwarding

  • Deleting sent messages

🔹 Supported Features

10. What features are supported?

  • Voice notes

  • WhatsApp calling

  • Automation & chatbots

  • Integrations for support, marketing, and sales

✔️ This guide helps you understand how to effectively use WhatsApp Business API with CONNEKTLY for scalable communication.
